Localization.Description: An account was created with specification of its type and use of suspicious arguments in the account creation command

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} created account {object.account.name} with superuser privileges on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created system account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} may have created an account by opening file "/etc/passwd" in the "w" (write) mode on host {event_src.host}
